title: Get the activity log of a Business Center
content:
Use this endpoint to get the activity log of Business Centers. The activity log records the operation history of the Business Center. ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/changelog/get/ **Method** GET **Header** ```xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Authorized access token.

For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |--- |--- |--- | | bc_id {Required} | string | Business Center ID.

To obtain the list of Business Centers that you can access, use [/bc/get/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1737115687501826). | | filtering | object | Filtering conditions. | #| start_date | string | Query start date, in the format of `YYYY-MM-DD` (UTC+0).

  • You need to specify both `start_date` and `end_date` or neither.
  • If both `start_date` and `end_date` are not specified, the activity log for the past seven days will be returned.

Recommended date range: six months.

Example: `2025-01-01`. | #| end_date | string | Query end date, in the format of `YYYY-MM-DD` (UTC+0).

  • You need to specify both `start_date` and `end_date` or neither.
  • If both `start_date` and `end_date` are not specified, the activity log for the past seven days will be returned.

Recommended date range: six months.

Example: `2025-01-01`. | #| activity_type | string | Activity type to query.

Enum values:
  • `ALL`: All types of changes.
  • `USER`: User. Changes mainly related to members and organization, including but not limited to the following scenarios:
    • Invitation of a member to the Business Center
    • Acceptance of the invitation to join the Business Center
    • Removal of a member from the Business Center
  • `ACCOUNT`: Account. Changes mainly related to creation and access management of ad accounts, including but not limited to the following scenarios:
    • Creating an ad account
    • Assigning a member access to an ad account
    • Revoking a member's access to an ad account
    • Sharing access to an ad account with a partner
    • Revoking a partner's access to an ad account
  • `ASSET`: Asset. Changes mainly related to assets, including but not limited to the following scenarios:
    • Creating or deleting a catalog
    • Requesting to add or approving the request to add a TikTok Shop
    • Assigning a member access to an asset
    • Revoking a member's access to an asset
  • `BUSINESS`: Business. Changes mainly related to the Business Center, including but not limited to the following scenarios:
    • Creating the Business Center
    • Changing the setting of the Business Center, including name and company name
Default value: `ALL`. | | lang | string | The language of the activity log.

Default value: `en`.

To find out the enum values, see Enum values for lang. | | sort_field | string | Field to sort by.

Enum value:
  • `operation_time`: To sort by the time when the activity occurred, which corresponds to the `time` parameter within the returned object array `changelog_list`.
Default value: `operation_time`. | | sort_type | string | Sorting order.

Enum values:
  • `DESC`: Descending.
    • When `sort_field` is `operation_time` or not passed, this value means to sort from the most recent to earliest activity.
  • `ASC`: Ascending.
    • When `sort_field` is `operation_time` or not passed, this value means to sort from the earliest to the most recent activity.
Default value: `DESC`. | | page | integer | Current page number.

Value range: ≥ 1.
Default value: 1.| | page_size | integer | Page size.

Value range: 1-50.
Default value: 10. | ``` ### Enum values for `lang` ```xtable | Value {30%} | Description{70%}| |---|---| | `ar` | Arabic | | `cs-CZ` | Czech | | `de` | German | | `en` | English | | `es` | Spanish | | `fil` | Filipino | | `fr` | French | | `id` | Indonesian | | `it` | Italian | | `ja` | Japanese | | `ko` | Korean | | `ms` | Malay | | `pl-PL` | Polish | | `pt` | Portuguese (Brazil) | | `ru` | Russian | | `sv-SE` | Swedish | | `th` | Thai | | `tr` | Turkish | | `vi` | Vietnamese | | `zh` | Chinese | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request GET 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/changelog/get/?bc_id={{bc_id}}&filtering={"start_date":"{{start_date}}","end_date":"{{end_date}}", "activity_type":"ALL"}&page_size=50' \ --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' (/code) ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field{30%}|Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |code |number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix-Return Code](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |message|string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |request_id |string|The log ID of a request, which uniquely identifies the request. | |data |object|Returned data.| #| changelog_list | object[] | Change log information. | ##| time | string | The time of the activity, in the format of `YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS` (UTC+0).

Example: `2025-01-01 00:00:01`. | ##| activity_type | string |  Activity type.

Enum values:
  • `USER`: User. Changes mainly related to members and organization, including but not limited to the following scenarios:
    • Invitation of a member to the Business Center
    • Acceptance of the invitation to join the Business Center
    • Removal of a member from the Business Center
  • `ACCOUNT`: Account. Changes mainly related to creation and access management of ad accounts, including but not limited to the following scenarios:
    • Creating an ad account
    • Assigning a member access to an ad account
    • Revoking a member's access to an ad account
    • Sharing access to an ad account with a partner
    • Revoking a partner's access to an ad account
  • `ASSET`: Asset. Changes mainly related to assets, including but not limited to the following scenarios:
    • Creating or deleting a catalog
    • Requesting to add or approving the request to add a TikTok Shop
    • Assigning a member access to an asset
    • Revoking a member's access to an asset
  • `BUSINESS`: Business. Changes mainly related to the Business Center, including but not limited to the following scenarios:
    • Creating the Business Center
    • Changing the setting of the Business Center, including name and company name
| ##| operator_id | string | The user ID of the operator. | ##| activity_log | string | Activity log details. | #| page_info | object | Page information. | ##| page | number | Current page number. | ##| page_size | number | Page size. | ##| total_number | number | Total number of results. | ##| total_page | number | Total number of pages. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "{{request_id}}", "data": { "changelog_list": [ { "activity_type": "USER", "activity_log": "{{activity_log}}", "operator_id": "{{operator_id}}", "time": "{{time}}" }, { "activity_type": "ASSET", "activity_log": "{{activity_log}}", "operator_id": "{{operator_id}}", "time": "{{time}}" } ], "page_info": { "total_number": 2, "page_size": 50, "total_page": 1, "page": 1 } } } (/code) ```
